features.name: dormancy
features.description: We can determine if a customer is dormant or not based on it's previous order history. At some point it can also determin churn. This feature is binary and is 1 if the customer is dormant and 0 otherwise. We use this feature to remove recency.

features.name: frequency
features.description: Total number of orders for each customer.

features.name: avg_items_per_order
features.description: Average number of items per order for each customer.

features.name: total_items
features.description: Total number of items for each customer.

features.name: avg_revenue_per_order
features.description: Average revenue per order for each customer.

features.name: return_count
features.description: Total number of returns for each customer.

features.name: total_return_value
features.description: Total value of returns for each customer.

features.name: avg_return_value
features.description: Average value of returns for each customer.
